HeartWise vs ChatGPT/Claude

ChatGPT/Claude gives answers. HeartWise gives personalized, actionable career, contract, and financial guidance built specifically for medical professionals.

📄
Contract Review & Negotiation
ChatGPT / Claude

High-level tips. Text-based. No financial modeling or clause-by-clause analysis.

HeartWise
🚩 Non-compete: 25mi / 2yr
✓ RVU rate: $55 (above MGMA)
⚠️ Tail coverage: not included

Highlights red flags, calculates financial impact, and suggests negotiation strategies.

📈
Financial Planning for Early Attendings
ChatGPT / Claude

General concepts only. No interactive projections, graphs, or milestone tracking.

HeartWise

Interactive, customizable plan with graphs, projections, and milestone tracking.

🔀
Scenario Simulations
ChatGPT / Claude
✗

Not available. No structured what-if analysis.

HeartWise
Offer A · Academic $620K
Offer B · Private $785K
Offer C · Hospital $710K

Run multiple "what-if" scenarios for contract offers, fellowship matches, or lifestyle choices — side by side.

ChatGPT and Claude are powerful AI tools — but they're general-purpose. HeartWise is your career co-pilot. Imagine a personalized guide that maps your path from residency to leadership, evaluates real contracts with financial insights, projects career outcomes before you make major decisions, and provides interactive dashboards tailored to physicians.

Meet the Founder

Mouzam Faroqui, MD, FACC
Practicing Physician · Founder of HeartWise
🗽 NYC-Trained Physician 🏥 Former Chief Resident / Fellow 📍 Practicing Physician — Houston, TX 📊 20+ Years in Medicine — from medical school to a seasoned Interventional Cardiologist
The Journey

From medical student to Chief Resident and cardiology fellow, my career required navigating complex decisions about training, specialization, finances, and long-term strategy.

I built HeartWise to help medical students, residents, and physicians make those decisions with structured frameworks, financial trajectory tools, and physician-built strategy.

"The decisions that shape your career shouldn't be made in the dark."

Training & Education
New York-Presbyterian Brooklyn Methodist Hospital
Weill Cornell Medicine
Internal Medicine Residency → Chief Resident
New York-Presbyterian Brooklyn Methodist Hospital
Weill Cornell Medicine
Cardiology Fellowship → Chief Cardiology Fellow
Deborah Heart and Lung Center
Sidney Kimmel Medical College at Thomas Jefferson University
Interventional Cardiology Fellowship → Chief Interventional Cardiology Fellow

Legal

Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Disclaimer

Terms of Service

Last updated: March 8, 2026

By accessing or using HeartWise ("the Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Platform.

1. Nature of the Service

HeartWise is an educational mentorship and career intelligence platform designed for physicians, medical students, residents, and fellows. The Platform provides structured decision-making tools, career analytics, financial modeling frameworks, and AI-generated strategic guidance.

2. Not Professional Advice

HeartWise does not provide medical, legal, financial, tax, or investment advice. All content, tools, AI-generated responses, and frameworks are for educational and informational purposes only. You should consult qualified professionals for individualized guidance.

3. Eligibility

You must be at least 18 years of age to use HeartWise.

4. Account Responsibility

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity under your account.

5. Acceptable Use

You agree not to use the Platform for unlawful purposes, reverse-engineer tools or content, share credentials, submit harmful content, or use automated scraping systems.

6. Subscriptions & Payments

Paid plans are billed monthly. Cancel any time; cancellation takes effect at the end of the billing period. No refunds for partial months. 48-hour guided access auto-converts to paid subscriptions unless cancelled before the access period ends.

7. Intellectual Property

All content, tools, and branding are the intellectual property of HeartWise. No reproduction or derivative works without written permission.

8. Physician-Reviewed Content

Physician reviews represent professional opinion within an educational context and do not constitute a doctor-patient relationship or clinical advice.

9. Limitation of Liability

HeartWise shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from use of the Platform. The Platform is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind.

10. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Texas. Disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Harris County, Texas.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 8, 2026

Information We Collect

Account Info: Name, email, training stage, specialty, institution, goals. Usage Data: Questions, tools used, interaction patterns. Technical Data: Browser type, device info, general location.

How We Use It

To provide and personalize the service, generate AI guidance, facilitate physician reviews, process payments, send service updates, and improve the Platform through anonymized analytics.

Data Sharing

We do not sell your data. We share only with: service providers (Stripe, Supabase, Vercel) as needed to operate; reviewing physicians in limited-identification format; and when required by law.

Your Rights

Access, update, or delete your data. Opt out of non-essential communications. Request data export. Contact us for any data inquiries.

Security

Data is stored with encryption in transit and at rest via Supabase (AWS). We implement industry-standard security but cannot guarantee absolute security.

Disclaimer

Last updated: March 8, 2026

Educational Purpose Only

All content is for informational and educational purposes only. No doctor-patient relationship is created. No guarantee of outcomes. AI may contain errors. Financial data are estimates. Always consult qualified professionals.

Contact

Email: heartwisementor@gmail.com

Founded by: Mouzam Faroqui, MD, FACC · Houston, Texas

Legal

Terms of Service

Last updated: March 8, 2026

By accessing or using HeartWise ("the Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Platform.

1. Nature of the Service

HeartWise is an educational mentorship and career intelligence platform designed for physicians, medical students, residents, and fellows. The Platform provides structured decision-making tools, career analytics, financial modeling frameworks, and AI-generated strategic guidance.

2. Not Professional Advice

HeartWise does not provide medical, legal, financial, tax, or investment advice. All content, tools, AI-generated responses, and frameworks are for educational and informational purposes only. You should consult qualified professionals — including physicians, attorneys, financial advisors, and tax professionals — for individualized guidance specific to your situation.

AI-generated outputs are computational frameworks, not personalized recommendations. They may contain inaccuracies or outdated information. Always verify critical information independently.

3. Eligibility

You must be at least 18 years of age to use HeartWise. By creating an account, you represent that you are at least 18 years old and that the information you provide is accurate.

4. Account Responsibility

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized access. HeartWise is not liable for losses arising from unauthorized use of your account.

5. Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

  • Use the Platform for any unlawful purpose
  • Attempt to reverse-engineer, copy, or redistribute the tools, algorithms, or content
  • Share your account credentials with others
  • Submit false, misleading, or harmful content
  • Use automated systems to scrape or extract data from the Platform

6. Subscriptions & Payments

Paid plans are billed on a recurring monthly basis. You may cancel at any time; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. No refunds are provided for partial months. 48-hour guided access auto-converts to paid subscriptions unless cancelled before the access period ends.

7. Intellectual Property

All content, tools, frameworks, and branding on HeartWise are the intellectual property of HeartWise and its creators. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without explicit written permission.

8. Physician-Reviewed Content

Certain responses may be reviewed by licensed physicians. These reviews represent the reviewing physician's professional opinion within an educational context and do not constitute a doctor-patient relationship, clinical advice, or a standard of care.

9. Limitation of Liability

HeartWise, its founders, employees, and affiliates shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Platform. This includes, without limitation, career decisions, financial outcomes, contract negotiations, or clinical decisions made using information from HeartWise.

The Platform is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied.

10. Termination

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time by contacting us.

11. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance. Material changes will be communicated via email or in-app notification.

12. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Texas, United States. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Harris County, Texas.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 8, 2026

1. Information We Collect

Account Information: Name, email address, training stage, specialty, institution, and career goals provided during registration.

Usage Data: Questions submitted, tools used, responses received, and interaction patterns within the Platform.

Technical Data: Browser type, device information, and general location (country/region) for service optimization.

2. How We Use Your Information

  • To provide and personalize the HeartWise service
  • To generate AI-powered strategic guidance tailored to your profile
  • To facilitate physician review of submitted questions
  • To process payments and manage subscriptions
  • To send important service updates and notifications
  • To improve the Platform through aggregated, anonymized analytics

3. Data Storage & Security

Your data is stored securely using Supabase (hosted on AWS infrastructure) with encryption in transit and at rest. We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information. However, no system is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

4. Data Sharing

We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with:

  • Service Providers: Payment processing (Stripe), authentication (Supabase), and hosting (Vercel) — only as necessary to operate the Platform
  • Reviewing Physicians: Questions submitted for physician review are shared with our medical review team in a de-identified or limited-identification format
  • Legal Requirements: When required by law, court order, or to protect the rights and safety of HeartWise or its users

5. Your Rights

You may:

  • Access and update your personal information through your profile settings
  • Request deletion of your account and associated data
  • Opt out of non-essential communications
  • Export your data upon request

6. Cookies & Local Storage

HeartWise uses browser local storage to maintain your session, preferences, and cached data for performance. We do not use third-party tracking cookies. Analytics, if implemented, use anonymized, aggregated data only.

7. Children's Privacy

HeartWise is not intended for individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect information from minors.

8. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of material changes via email or in-app notification. Continued use constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

Disclaimer

Last updated: March 8, 2026

Educational Purpose Only

HeartWise is an educational mentorship platform. All content — including AI-generated responses, interactive tools, financial models, competitiveness calculators, contract analysis frameworks, and career strategy builders — is provided for informational and educational purposes only.

No Doctor-Patient Relationship: Use of HeartWise does not create a doctor-patient relationship between you and any physician associated with the Platform, including Dr. Mouzam Faroqui or any reviewing physician.

No Guarantee of Outcomes: Career decisions, financial outcomes, match results, contract negotiations, and salary discussions are inherently uncertain. HeartWise provides frameworks for thinking — not guarantees of results. Past data and benchmarks (including MGMA, match rate, and compensation data) are approximations and may not reflect your specific circumstances.

AI Limitations: AI-generated content may contain errors, outdated information, or biases. All AI outputs should be verified independently and used as starting points for discussion with qualified professionals — not as final answers.

Financial Information: Compensation data, RVU benchmarks, financial projections, and salary comparisons are estimates based on publicly available survey data. Your actual compensation will depend on your specific contract, location, practice type, and negotiation. Always consult a financial advisor and physician contract attorney for personalized guidance.

Third-Party Data: HeartWise references data from MGMA, AAMC, NRMP, and other public sources. We do not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of third-party data. Referenced data is current as of the dates noted and may change.

Contact

For questions about these policies, account deletion requests, or data inquiries:

Email: heartwisementor@gmail.com

Founded by: Mouzam Faroqui, MD, FACC

Location: Houston, Texas
